title: Knock Out New Drains/Toilets and Urinals, 1 Litre
features: Powerful outside drain and toilet unblocked designed to be a safer alternative to sulphuric acid unblockers
Rapidly dissolves organic material to free up blockages
Boosted caustic liquid formula for easy application at the right strength for wide bore pipes and drains
Ideal to speed up slow draining plug holes and as a general maintenance to keep drains open
description: Product Description Knockout drains, toilets and urinals special formulation is ready to use, and will break down the fats, grease and hair that commonly cause blockages or slow running wastes, leaving waste pipes clean and sanitised. Drains, toilet and urinals (dtu) is a caustic/Sodium Hydroxide based product designed to clear blockages caused by organic substances. Directions 1. Clear the area around the drain. 2. Slowly pour the contents of the bottle into the drain. 3. Wait for the specified time mentioned on the bottle. 4. Rinse the drain with water. 5. Repeat if necessary. Safety Warning DANGER: Contains sodium hydroxide (caustic soda). Can cause severe burns. Keep out of reach children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case eyes, rinse immediately plenty water seek medical advice. Wear suitable protective clothing, gloves, eye/face protection. accident or if you feel unwell, advice (show the label where possible). Do not mix other chemicals, especially acids, as violent reactions may occur. See more
